verdicts.gptExplanation: „Kante wechseln“ applies to both skiing and snowboarding, so it is not specific enough for the Snowboard group.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use a snowboard-specific clue such as „Board quer stellen“ or „Eine Planke unter den Füßen“.

verdicts.gptExplanation: „Flug in der Nacht“ is not specific to a family with child; business travelers, backpackers and seniors can also take night flights. It is a weak category clue.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use „Buggy am Gate“ or „Kinderwagen aufgeben“.

verdicts.gptExplanation: „Handy nie weg“ is not specific to Geschäftsreisender and can apply to most traveler types.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use a business-specific clue such as „Laptop im Handgepäck“ or „Meeting nach Landung“.

verdicts.gptExplanation: „Österreich“ and „Bayern“ overlap culturally and culinarily, especially around Semmel/Brezel-style breakfast items and southern German/Austrian terms. The split is not clean enough for easy tier.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more distinct regions or more uniquely diagnostic breakfast items.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several clues are awkward or not idiomatic: „Haferflocken alt“ and „Korn dazu eigentlich“ are especially unclear as standalone German items.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rewrite as idiomatic clues, e.g. „Haferflocken über Nacht“ and, if intended, use a clearer North German breakfast item.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several entries in the double-meaning groups do not satisfy the stated category. In particular, Bank and Sessel are not animal names; Falke is not a household appliance; and Hammer is a tool rather than a household appliance and only an animal by abbreviation/compound such as Hammerhai.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with words that are independently common animal names and common names for the other domain.

verdicts.gptExplanation: All four labels are built as 'Tier UND ...', so the animal criterion is shared across every category. That can work as a theme, but here the category labels are not mutually exclusive enough because every answer is expected to be an animal word plus another meaning.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Make the second meanings the actual group labels, or ensure every animal word has exactly one intended second meaning among the four.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several alleged colloquial profession terms are not actually colloquial terms for the listed profession. Bücherwurm is a bookworm, not a teacher; Wachmann is normally a guard/security guard, not a police officer; Jurist is a standard broader legal profession term, not specifically a colloquial lawyer term; Pädagoge is standard, not folk slang for teacher.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use clearly profession-specific colloquialisms, and avoid standard occupational titles.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Paragrafenreiter usually means a legalistic pedant or stickler, not necessarily an attorney, so it does not uniquely point to Anwalt.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with a more lawyer-specific colloquialism.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Some city nickname entries appear malformed, invented, or not established German nicknames. 'Weltstadt Herz' is missing the usual 'mit' in 'Weltstadt mit Herz'; 'Lederhosen-Hptst.', 'Frauenkirchen-Stadt', and 'Kölsche Metropole' read as artificial descriptors rather than recognizable nicknames.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use established nicknames in their normal forms, e.g. 'Weltstadt mit Herz'.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Bauernbursche is a very minor/role-like figure from Werther and is likely too specialist for a medium grouping puzzle compared with the other named characters.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use a more recognizable Werther figure if possible.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The labels say 'Erstes Wort', but the listed items are work titles, not first words of those works. The category wording is therefore factually inconsistent with the answers.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename the labels to 'Werke von ...' or replace items with actual opening words.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several abbreviations are not uniquely tied to the period named. KPD, SPD, and Reichswehr existed in the Weimar period but are not exclusive to it as abbreviations or institutions; BKA, BND, and MAD are BRD institutions but not specifically a distinct 'BRD-Zeit' historical abbreviation set in the same sense as DDR/NS categories.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use period-exclusive institutions/abbreviations or relabel as 'gegründet/typisch in ...' with tighter criteria.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several scientists are strongly associated with multiple scientific fields. Fraunhofer was primarily an optician/physicist as well as important to astronomy; Bunsen is widely known in chemistry and physics; Virchow and Ehrlich are also major medical figures. This weakens unique category membership.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use figures whose public association is clearly one discipline, or label by a specific contribution.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Qasim and Bahr did not receive the Nobel Peace Prize. Bahr is associated with Ostpolitik but was not a Nobel laureate; 'Qasim' is not a German Nobel Peace Prize winner.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with actual German or Germany-associated Peace Prize laureates, depending on the intended scope.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Prolegomena is not one of Kant's three Critiques, so the group 'Kants drei Kritiken' cannot contain four valid items with Prolegomena included.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename the group to include major critical works, or replace Prolegomena with a valid related category item and adjust the label.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Kants Kernbegriffe and Kants Kategorien overlap conceptually because categories such as Kausalität, Substanz, Wechselwirkung, and Modalität are also Kantian core concepts. 'Transzendental' also cuts across the works and categories.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Separate by precise type, e.g. 'Kategorien der Relation/Modalität' versus 'Begriffe außerhalb der Kategorientafel'.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Zarathustra is both the title figure of Also sprach Zarathustra and part of a main work title, so it can tug toward both 'Hauptwerke' and 'Figuren'. Dionysos and Apollon are also conceptual poles in Nietzsche, not simply 'figures'.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use a clearer label such as 'Nietzscheanische Figuren/Symbole' or avoid title/figure duplication.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Nietzsche Aphorismenthemen' with generic items like Moral, Wahrheit, Kunst, Religion is too broad and semantically weak for a fair medium puzzle; these are broad philosophy themes rather than distinctive sortable answer tokens.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with more distinctive Nietzsche terms or a more concrete category.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Marxistische Konzepte' and 'Marxistische Begriffe' are not meaningfully distinct labels. Proletariat, Bourgeoisie, Klassenkampf, and Dialektik are also Marxist concepts, so the labels overlap.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more precise labels, such as 'Ökonomiekritik' versus 'Klassen- und Geschichtsbegriffe'.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Libido is not cleanly a separate 'Trieb' alongside Eros and Thanatos; it is psychic/sexual energy in Freud and overlaps with Eros. Unbewusstes is not one of the structural instances Es/Ich/Über-Ich, so it does not fit 'Freuds Instanzen'.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Keep Instanzen to Es, Ich, Über-Ich and use a different fourth item/category; separate drives from energies/concepts.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Freuds Konzepte' and 'Freuds Methoden' overlap because Traumdeutung and Katharsis are also Freudian concepts, while Analyse is too generic and could describe the whole school.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use a more specific method set, e.g. technique names only.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Rattenfänger is primarily associated with Hameln in Lower Saxony and is not a general North German sea/coast legend. Erdmänneken is more broadly German/Westphalian and not clearly Schwarzwald. Wildes Heer is widespread across Germanic folklore, not specifically Bavarian.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use location-specific legends with unambiguous regional attachment.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several regional legend labels/items are obscure or artificial-sounding for medium difficulty, especially Stormgeist and generic items like Wassernix/Holzmann without a well-known named saga anchor.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Prefer widely known named sagas or lower the expected difficulty.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Thor is primarily a thunder god, not normally classified as a war god. Saraswati is primarily a goddess of knowledge, music, arts, and learning rather than a direct counterpart to wisdom gods in the same way as Athena/Odin/Thoth.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with more canonical functional matches.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Hamsa is used across Jewish, Islamic, and broader Middle Eastern/North African cultures, so it is not uniquely a Jewish symbol. Om is primarily associated with Hinduism and other Indian religions; its use in Buddhism is not exclusive and may confuse the Buddhism group.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use symbols more exclusive to each tradition.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Koran and Thora are sacred texts rather than symbols in the same sense as Kreuz, Davidstern, Dharmarad, or Lotus.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Either relabel to include texts or replace with visual symbols.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The 'Nur ...' labels are too absolute and factually wrong. Beichte and Eucharistie exist in multiple Christian traditions; Synode is not only Protestant; Patriarch is not only Orthodox; Landeskirche is a regional Protestant structure but not a general 'only evangelical' doctrine.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Remove 'Nur' or use tradition-specific institutional terms that are genuinely exclusive in ordinary usage.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The title groups overlap historically and conceptually. Kaiser, König, Herzog, and Fürst can be ancient, medieval, or modern monarchic titles; Kalif and Papst are also rulers as well as religious titles; Consul is an office rather than a monarchic-style ruler title.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use non-overlapping criteria, such as 'monarchic rank', 'religious office', 'Roman offices', and 'modern executive offices'.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Some ranks are not unique to the branch labels. General, Leutnant, Major, Oberst and Unteroffizier occur across German armed forces branches, not only Heer or Luftwaffe; Kapitän can also mean a civilian captain and is not the standard concise naval rank without qualifier.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use branch-specific rank names or include exact Bundeswehr rank forms.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Galeere spans antiquity, medieval, and early modern naval history; Kogge and Holk were primarily merchant ship types though they could be armed. Galleon is usually early modern, but the label 'Neuzeit' overlaps with modern/early-modern periodization.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use tighter period labels and ship types that are clearly warship-specific.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Streitaxt is not uniquely antique and is strongly associated with medieval weapons too. Kanone appears from the late medieval period onward, and Bajonett bridges early modern and modern categories.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Choose period-distinct weapon examples.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The labels are inaccurate. Newton's laws of motion are three laws; the gravitational law is Newtonian but not one of the three. Ohm's law is a single relation, while Widerstand, Spannung, and Stromstärke are electrical quantities. Boyle's gas law is not the umbrella for Gay-Lussac, Charles, and Avogadro.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename groups to 'Newtonsche Physik', 'Elektrische Grundgrößen', and 'Gasgesetze' or replace items with exact laws.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Verbrennung is itself a redox/oxidation process, so 'Verbrennungsreaktion' and 'Redoxreaktion' overlap. Oxidation belongs directly to redox as well as combustion.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Avoid nested reaction categories; use mutually exclusive example reactions or mechanisms.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: Titration can be used for acid-base, redox, complexometric, and precipitation analyses, so it is not uniquely an acid-base reaction item. Kristallisation is not the same as precipitation and can occur outside precipitation reactions.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more reaction-specific terms.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Latin genera/families/orders across biology are likely too specialist for medium in a general German word puzzle, especially mixed taxonomic ranks with no accessible surface clue.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Lower difficulty expectation or use German common names/taxonomic ranks consistently.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Synapse and Neuron are not organs; Aorta, Vene, and Kapillare are vessels rather than organs. The category label 'Organe' is therefore inaccurate for multiple systems.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename to 'Bestandteile' or use actual organs only.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The medical specialty categories overlap in real clinical practice. Bypass and Transplantation can be cardiac/vascular/transplant surgery but also relate to internal medicine conditions; Schlaganfall is often acute neurology but also vascular/internal medicine; Fraktur can be orthopedics/trauma rather than generic surgery.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use labels like 'typische Eingriffe' versus 'typische Diagnosen', or choose non-overlapping examples.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Messkolben is both a vessel and a measuring device, so it overlaps 'Messgeräte' and 'Behälter'. Zentrifuge is a lab device/instrument, not simply a hand tool, and can feel parallel to Messgeräte.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Separate containers from measuring volumetric glassware, and relabel tools/devices more precisely.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Kernel is core operating-system software, but it can also be treated as part of system software; API is a software interface rather than a software object like compiler/OS. Firewall can be a network device or security concept, overlapping network and IT security labels.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more homogeneous category definitions.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Breitensuche, Tiefensuche, and A-Stern are also graph algorithms, so 'Suchalgorithmen' and 'Graphenalgorithmen' overlap. SHA-256 is a hash function, not an encryption algorithm in the same sense as AES/RSA.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use non-graph search algorithms for the search group, or relabel the graph group to shortest path/MST.

verdicts.gptExplanation: NoSQL is not a database language; it is an umbrella term/model family. GraphQL is primarily an API query language, not a database language in the same class as SQL/SPARQL.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with actual database query languages or relabel the category.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Redis is both a database product and a key-value database, so it overlaps with the 'Schlüssel-Wert' model item. MongoDB similarly directly exemplifies Dokumenten-DB.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Avoid using products that are direct named examples of another group’s model labels, or make the model labels abstract enough to avoid item confusion.

verdicts.gptExplanation: DSA is a digital signature algorithm rather than an asymmetric encryption scheme. Hash and Digitale Signatur are core cryptographic concepts but also directly underlying applications/protocols such as HTTPS and SSH, making categories somewhat broad.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Relabel asymmetric group as 'asymmetrische Verfahren' or replace DSA with a true encryption/key-exchange item.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Clustering and neuronale Netze are model/method types, while Transformer/CNN/RNN/GAN are neural model architectures. The method/model labels overlap rather than being cleanly distinct.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Make one category 'Lernparadigmen' and replace architecture-overlapping items in ML-Methoden.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: Quantenanwendungen include Kryptografie, but Shor's algorithm directly targets cryptographic assumptions, and quantum cryptography is also a quantum-information concept. 'Maschinelles Lernen' also overlaps with QAOA/VQE-style optimization/modeling applications.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use applications that do not duplicate algorithm targets, or label algorithm categories more narrowly.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: Stickney is a crater on Phobos, not a moon of Mars. Laputa is fictional and not a real Martian moon. Mars has only Phobos and Deimos.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Do not make a four-item 'Moons of Mars' group; choose another planet or change the category.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Neutronenstern and Magnetar are not ordinary star spectral/evolutionary types in the same sense as Roter Riese and Weißer Zwerg; a magnetar is a kind of neutron star. Zwergplanet is not usually a 'Kleinkörper' under common astronomical classification and may be treated separately.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Avoid nested items like neutron star/magnetar in the same group, and use official small-body categories.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Dunkle Energie is not a dark matter concept; it is a separate cosmological component. Gravitationslinse is an observational effect used to infer dark matter, not itself a dark matter concept.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with dark matter candidates/properties or relabel the group as broader cosmology evidence/components.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Singularität belongs strongly to black holes as well as Big Bang cosmology, so it overlaps with the 'Schwarze Löcher' group.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use a universe-specific term that does not also point to black holes.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Viele Welten appears as a quantum theory/interpretation here and also appears as a multiverse concept in de-0348; within this puzzle it is fine as an interpretation, but 'Quantentheorien' mixes interpretations with QFT, a formal theory, making the group conceptually uneven.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename to 'Interpretationen und Theorien' or use only interpretations.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Schwarzes Loch is an object/prediction associated with general relativity, while Ereignishorizont appears in the related black-hole vocabulary in nearby science puzzles; within this puzzle it is broader than a clean ART concept. Perihelverschiebung is an observed effect/test and also a relativistic consequence, overlapping experiment and consequence labels.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use strictly conceptual terms in ART and reserve observations/tests for the experiment group.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Zoom changes framing/einstellungsgröße and is not a physical camera movement like Schwenk or Fahrt. Handkamera is a camera style/technique rather than a movement.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename to 'Kamerabewegung/-technik' or replace with Dolly/Kran/Steadicam-style movement terms.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The Stummfilm and Expressionismus groups overlap heavily: Nosferatu, Metropolis, Der Golem, and Das Cabinet des Dr. Caligari are silent-era German films and several are also central expressionist works. Caligari appears split by shortened title while 'Das Cabinet' refers to the same film, creating a direct duplicate/overlap.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Do not split German silent film and expressionist film as separate groups unless the items are mutually exclusive.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Das Cabinet' and 'Caligari' both point to Das Cabinet des Dr. Caligari, so the puzzle contains duplicate references to the same film across different groups.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Remove one and replace with a distinct film.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Takt is both meter and bar/measure and can be treated as a broad music-theory term; Modulation can involve changing key, overlapping with the Tonarten group conceptually though not as an item token. The categories remain mostly solvable, but the conceptual boundaries are soft.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more narrowly rhythm-specific items and avoid harmony terms that directly reference key changes if ambiguity is a concern.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Exposition, Durchführung, and Reprise are parts of sonata form, not unique 'features of the sonata' as a genre; Allegro and Finale can also describe sonata movements. Ouvertüre can be part of an opera and also an independent/symphonic form, but is acceptable only with a broad label.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use labels for form sections versus genre features, or choose more genre-specific items.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Improvisation is a feature of jazz broadly, not specifically Bebop. Kontrapunkt is not uniquely Cool Jazz. 'Keine Struktur' is an oversimplified and arguably inaccurate description of Free Jazz.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more distinctive stylistic markers or artist names per style.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several artists span decades or are more strongly associated with different genre histories than 'rock by decade'. Metallica formed in the 1980s but is also central to metal; Depeche Mode and The Cure are not straightforward rock exemplars; Radiohead and Oasis are 1990s but continue beyond that decade.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use decade-specific movements/releases or label by 'Bands formed/prominent in decade'.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Beethoven bridges Classical and Romantic periods, and Schubert is often transitional/early Romantic with Classical roots. Stravinsky spans modernism and neoclassicism. These are common music-history edge cases that weaken unique sorting.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use less transitional composers or specify 'hauptsächlich zugeordnet'.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Nachtwache and Die Nachtwache are the same painting, duplicated in the same group.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace one duplicate with a distinct oil-on-canvas work.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Mona Lisa is painted on a poplar panel, not oil on canvas. Leonardo's Last Supper is a mural using tempera/oil on dry wall, not a true fresco. The group labels by technique are therefore factually wrong for major items.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use works whose support/technique matches the label exactly.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The Aquarell group mixes vague artist/work references rather than exact works: 'Paul Klee' is an artist, not a work, and 'Turner Seestücke' is a broad subject category. This makes item identity unclear.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use exact artwork titles and consistent naming.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Kuppel and Symmetrie are not distinctive to their assigned styles; both appear across many architectural styles. Bauhaus is a movement/school, not simply an architectural element like the other modern items.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use style-specific elements or relabel the categories as broad associations.

verdicts.gptExplanation: "Mediterrane Gerichte" and "Arabische Gerichte" are overlapping regional food domains. Items such as Hummus, Tabouleh and Falafel are commonly understood as both Levantine/Arab and Mediterranean, so the category boundary is not fair.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use non-overlapping regional labels, or replace the Mediterranean set with clearly Southern European dishes and the Arab set with items not commonly marketed as Mediterranean.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Pinot Noir and Spätburgunder are the same grape variety under different names, so the red grape group contains duplicate identities.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace one with a distinct red variety such as Syrah, Malbec, Tempranillo or Cabernet Franc.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The "Hefetypen" group mixes fermentation behavior with product form. Trockenhefe can be top-fermenting or bottom-fermenting, so it is not parallel with Obergärige/Untergärige/Wildhefe.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use a clearer fourth yeast category such as Reinzuchthefe, Brettanomyces or Lagerhefe, depending on intended framing.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The puzzle separates French cutting techniques from "Französische Küchentechn." but Brunoise, Julienne and Chiffonade are themselves French culinary techniques. "Mise en place Begriffe" is also an imprecise label for cutting/prep methods.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename the first group to "Schneidetechniken" and the fourth to a non-overlapping technique family, or replace the French technique group with non-cutting cooking methods only.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: Amuse-Bouche is a small appetizer/course, and Sommelier is a role, not cleanly a service term in the same sense as À la carte or Degustation.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more direct service terms such as Gueridon, Mise en place service, Bestellaufnahme or Weinservice, or retitle the group more broadly.

verdicts.gptExplanation: "Bundesverfassung" is not the standard institution/document name in Germany; the constitution is the Grundgesetz. As written it is not parallel with Bundestag, Bundesrat and Bundeskanzler.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with Grundgesetz, Bundespräsident or Bundesverfassungsgericht depending on the intended category.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The NATO and G7 groups rely heavily on specialist abbreviations or insider process terms. NAC, SACEUR, ACO, Sherpas and Troika are likely too obscure for a medium German general-audience puzzle.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more recognizable international-organization terms or raise the tier.

verdicts.gptExplanation: "Kommuniqué" is an output document, not a G7 body or governing structure, so it does not fit the label "G7-Gremien".
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename the category to something like "G7-Begriffe" or replace Kommuniqué with a clearer forum/role.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Sanktion appears under diplomatic instruments, but sanctions also belong naturally with international law/policy terminology; Embargo is a type of sanction, making the two items semantically nested.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace one with a distinct diplomatic tool such as Note, Gipfel, Schlichtung or Vermittlung.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The Wiener Kongress is a diplomatic conference, not a treaty. "Helsinki" is also an abbreviated reference, likely to the Helsinki Final Act, rather than a clear treaty title.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use precise treaty/agreement names, e.g. Wiener Schlussakte and Helsinki-Schlussakte, or retitle the group to include conferences and accords.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several entries are organizations, tactics or broad concepts rather than milestones, so the category labels do not consistently describe the items. BUND and Gewerkschaft are especially not milestones.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Retitle groups to include actors/concepts, or replace with specific dated milestones.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The Montreal Protocol is primarily an ozone-layer treaty, not a climate agreement in the same direct sense as Kyoto, Paris or Glasgow.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with UNFCCC, Kopenhagen-Akkord or another climate-specific agreement.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Vestas is both a company and strongly associated with wind-power technology, while Oatly/Beyond Meat are also products/food brands. The "Nachhaltige Unternehmen" group is somewhat subjective and may overlap with the technology/product framing.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use a less subjective company category, e.g. "Unternehmen mit Nachhaltigkeitsimage", or replace with unambiguous labels.

verdicts.gptExplanation: CRISPR is a gene-editing method/tool, not an application. GMO and Transgen are organism/property concepts, and "Genfarm" is not a standard German biotech application term.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename to "Gentechnik-Begriffe" or replace with actual applications such as Gentherapie, Pflanzenzüchtung, Diagnostik and Pharmaproduktion.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Biogas is commonly produced by anaerobic fermentation, while Biokraftstoff can also be fermentation-based. That creates overlap between enzyme applications and fermentation applications.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace Biokraftstoff or Biogas with a more clearly non-overlapping example.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Precision medicine, genomics, biomarkers, liquid biopsy and targeted therapy strongly overlap conceptually with AI diagnostics/drug discovery and gene therapy in modern medical practice. The groups are not as semantically separated as a fair grouping puzzle needs.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Make one group strictly technology modalities, one strictly sample/diagnostic terms, and one strictly therapy delivery mechanisms.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: Water is generally not counted as a macronutrient in the same nutritional classification as carbohydrates, protein and fat.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace Wasser with Ballaststoffe if using a broader nutrition grouping, or retitle to "Hauptnährstoffe und Wasser".

verdicts.gptExplanation: Konzentration and Kontrolle can also be mental training or pressure-management concepts, while Atemkontrolle overlaps with relaxation. The sport-psychology categories are conceptually close and not cleanly separable.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more distinctive item sets, such as named flow dimensions, named motivation theories, and concrete intervention methods.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Swimming and cycling are endurance training activities, but they can also be general sports rather than training forms. Intervalltraining is a method that can also apply to swimming/cycling/running, making the group internally uneven.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use parallel endurance methods such as Dauerlauf, Tempolauf, Fahrtspiel and Grundlagentraining, or retitle to "Ausdauersportarten und -methoden".

verdicts.gptExplanation: Denisova is not normally the species name; the standard German term is Denisova-Mensch or Denisovaner. "Hominiden-Arten" is also imprecise because Neandertaler/Denisovaner are populations or human forms depending on taxonomy.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use Homo denisova/Denisovaner only if that taxonomy is intended, or rename the group to "Frühe Menschenformen".

verdicts.gptExplanation: Kreideküste is a landform/geological feature, not a geological event. It does not fit alongside Variscan folding, Alpine uplift and glaciation.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with a real geological event/process such as Kreidezeit, Gebirgsbildung or Eiszeit.

verdicts.gptExplanation: El Niño is a coupled ocean-atmosphere climate phenomenon, not a marine current. Thermohalin is also an adjective/short form for thermohaline circulation, not a named current like Golfstrom or Humboldtstrom.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use named currents such as Kuroshio, Benguelastrom, Labradorstrom or Antarktischer Zirkumpolarstrom.

verdicts.gptExplanation: "Sargas someer" appears to be a typo for Sargassosee. As written, the item is malformed and likely confusing.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Correct to Sargassosee or replace with Seegraswiese.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Bodenbakterien are soil microorganisms, not soil fauna. The category mixes animals with microbes.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with Milben, Asseln, Nematoden or another soil animal group.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Eiche, Fichte, Kiefer and Buche are tree species as well as wood types. In a puzzle with forest types and forest protection, "Holzarten" can be interpreted as trees rather than timber, making the boundary less clean.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use material names like Eichenholz/Fichtenholz or retitle the group to "Baumarten" and adjust surrounding categories if needed.

verdicts.gptExplanation: "Legislation" is an English term in an otherwise German puzzle. German players would expect Gesetzgebung or Rechtsetzung.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with Gesetzgebung.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The distinction between "Genetik-Konzepte" and "Genetik-Fachbegriffe" is too broad and overlapping. Allel and Locus are also core genetic concepts, while Mutation appears as a concept though it is also a technical term.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Retitle one group more specifically, e.g. "Vererbungsbegriffe" versus "Molekulargenetische Methoden", or replace one set.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Mendel is central to genetics and inheritance, but not usually a key figure of evolutionary theory in the same direct way as Darwin, Wallace and Huxley.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with Lyell, Mayr, Dobzhansky or Lamarck depending on intended historical scope.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several synonym groups mix different senses. "Veraltet" means obsolete rather than old in age, and "gering" means small in amount/importance, not physically small like winzig or zierlich.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use sense-consistent synonyms, e.g. bejahrt/greis for old age and klein/mini/kompakt for physical smallness.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The category labels say "Gegensätze", but each group contains two antonym pairs rather than four items sharing a single category. The solve logic becomes pair-based and may be confusing for a 4-item grouping puzzle.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Retitle groups as semantic fields such as Temperaturwörter and Größenwörter, or use four clear members of one pole per category.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The adverb group is not grammatically reliable. "Schriftweise" is uncommon/unnatural, and "werfend" is a participle rather than a normal adverb parallel to the others. "Laufend" can also be adjectival/participle.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace the adverb category with a more robust part-of-speech group, or use unambiguous adverbs.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Balkon entered German via French but ultimately traces to Italian/Germanic roots; as a simple "Aus dem Französischen" item it is debatable. Notiz also came via Latin/French pathways and may be less clean than the other Latin examples.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use less disputed loanwords for etymology categories, or label as "über das Französische" where appropriate.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The "PKW steht für …" group is not a normal category: it contains fragments of one abbreviation expansion, including distractors or partial words. "Personenkraft" and "Kraftwagen" together form Personenkraftwagen, while "Privat" is wrong.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace this group with a parallel abbreviation category, or use four complete abbreviations and their meanings.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Säge and Schere are not exclusive to Tischler or Schneider respectively, and Skalpell can be used by surgeons rather than doctors generally. The category is still understandable, but some tools are broad enough to weaken uniqueness.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more profession-specific tools such as Japansäge/Simshobel, Stoffschere, and Otoskop/Reflexhammer.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Generic titles like Selbstbildnis/Selbstporträt alt and shortened titles like Wanderer, Kreidefelsen and Adele Bloch may be too abbreviated to identify uniquely. This is a recognition issue for medium tier.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use full conventional titles such as Wanderer über dem Nebelmeer and Bildnis Adele Bloch-Bauer I.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Matching aria incipits to operas at this density is specialist opera knowledge, especially with shortened German/Italian titles. This is too hard for medium.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Raise difficulty or use more widely known complete aria titles.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Goethe and Schiller are deliberately split by life phase across Sturm und Drang and Weimarer Klassik. This is historically defensible but unfair as a grouping puzzle because the same identity belongs to two listed literary-epoch categories.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Avoid splitting the same author by phase; use distinct representatives for each epoch.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Herder and Wieland are associated with Weimar Classicism but also with Enlightenment/Sturm-und-Drang contexts, so the epoch labels are somewhat porous.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more canonical works or figures with less cross-epoch ambiguity.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Each category is keyed by the prompt phrase and contains one correct completion plus three incorrect completions. That creates trivia/multiple-choice sets rather than four items that all belong to the category.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use four complete proverb endings as one group and separate them from other proverb-related categories, or redesign as a different puzzle type.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several fairy-tale motifs overlap: a helpful witch or speaking animal can also be a magical transformation agent, and a magic cloak is usually a magical object/helper rather than a reward category parallel to princess/kingdom.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use stricter motif labels such as "Verwandlungsfiguren", "Aufgaben", "Helferfiguren" and "Belohnungen ohne magische Funktion".

verdicts.gptExplanation: Leibniz died in 1716 and is usually classified as early modern/rationalist, not straightforwardly as an Enlightenment figure in the same German literary-historical sense as Kant and Lessing. Beethoven and Kleist are also not cleanly "Romantik-Ära" representatives.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more clearly period-aligned figures, or retitle categories as broad chronological eras rather than movements.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The category title "Dynastien des Reiches" suggests Holy Roman Empire dynasties, but the Wittelsbach and Hohenzollern groups include later Bavarian/Prussian/German imperial rulers. The scope is historically mixed.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Retitle to "Herrscherhäuser im deutschsprachigen Raum" or restrict all items to Holy Roman Empire rulers.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Names like Maximilian I. and Otto I. are not unique without territorial qualifiers and can point to different dynasties/rulers, which is risky in a dynastic puzzle.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use full identifiers such as Maximilian I. Joseph von Bayern or Otto I. von Bayern.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Grouping authors by regional origin is inherently fuzzy for figures who lived and worked across multiple places. E.T.A. Hoffmann, for example, was born in Königsberg and is not simply "Preußisch" in the same way as Fontane; Karl Valentin is primarily a comedian/performer as much as an author.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use birthplace-specific labels or replace borderline figures with clearer regional literary authors.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Röntgen is a physicist whose discovery is medically important, so placing him under Medizin while Hertz is under Elektrizität can feel field-of-impact rather than inventor field. Bosch is associated with industrial chemistry/engineering and could overlap with Maschinenbau/industry framing.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Retitle to "Wissenschaftler nach Wirkungsfeld" or use more direct medical inventors/discoverers.

verdicts.gptExplanation: DNA-Struktur is a Nobel-associated discovery involving chemistry/medicine/physiology as well as biology, and Insulin has Nobel relevance in medicine and chemistry contexts. The category labels are broad prize fields rather than unique item domains.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use specific Nobel prize fields with laureate/year anchors or choose less cross-field concepts.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: Major philosophers cannot be cleanly assigned to only one of these broad themes. Kant is central to ethics as well as epistemology, Nietzsche to existential questions as well as ethics, and Marx to economics/history as well as society.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use specific works or doctrines rather than whole philosophers, or make the categories much narrower.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The Pan Am Building is not a Walter Gropius building; it was designed by Emery Roth & Sons with Pietro Belluschi and Walter Gropius as collaborating architects, making attribution contested and not parallel with the other examples.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with a more direct Gropius work such as Gropius House or Auerbach House.

verdicts.gptExplanation: "Harvard Gebäude" is too vague to identify a specific Gropius building or complex. It likely refers to the Harvard Graduate Center, but the item is not unambiguous.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use the full name Harvard Graduate Center.

verdicts.gptExplanation: "Symbole des Wunders" and "Produkte der Zeit" are not semantically distinct; Kühlschrank, Fernsehen, Plattenspieler and Waschmaschine can all be products and symbols of the Wirtschaftswunder consumer era.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Make one category specifically "Konsumgüter" and replace the other with non-product symbols, or merge/rebuild the split.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: Karl Schiller is more associated with later 1960s economic policy than the classic 1950s Wirtschaftswunder period, so he is not parallel with Erhard/Adenauer.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with a figure more directly tied to the Wirtschaftswunder period.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Put-Option is both a hedge strategy instrument and a derivative type, while Leerverkauf/Short exposure can also be a bearish strategy. The hedge and derivative categories overlap by design here.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Separate strategies from instruments more cleanly, e.g. use "Hedge-Techniken" without derivative names or make both groups instrument types with non-overlapping labels.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Lohnsteuer and Kapitalertragsteuer are Erhebungsformen/Sonderformen der Einkommensteuer, while Schenkungsteuer is closely linked with Erbschaftsteuer. The category labels are tax types but include subtypes and adjacent taxes, creating nested relationships.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use only concepts within each tax type that are not themselves separate tax labels, or retitle categories to "Begriffe rund um …".

verdicts.gptExplanation: Bundesversammlung belongs most directly to the election of the Bundespräsident but is itself a separate constitutional body. Including it under Bundespräsident may confuse a puzzle specifically about constitutional organs.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with Begnadigungsrecht, Staatsbesuch or Ernennung Bundeskanzler.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Schulwesen is primarily Article 7 GG, which fits Art. 6-10, but Versammlungsfreiheit is Article 8 and Briefgeheimnis Article 10. The larger issue is Article 9 (Vereinigungsfreiheit) is absent while Art. 6-10 has only selected topics; that may be acceptable. However, Auslieferungsverbot is Article 16/16a context, not Art. 11-15, so it is placed in the wrong range.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace with Sozialisierung, Eigentum/Erbrecht or Staatsangehörigkeit depending on intended range, or adjust the article range.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Widerstandsrecht is in Art. 20 Abs. 4 GG, but it is much more specific than the structural principles in the same group and may stand out as a different kind of item.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Consider replacing with Rechtsstaatsprinzip for a more parallel Art. 20 principles group.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Das Montrealer Protokoll ist primär ein Abkommen zum Schutz der Ozonschicht, nicht ein Klimaschutzabkommen wie Paris/Kyoto/Glasgow. Außerdem ist der TTIP-Entwurf kein abgeschlossenes internationales Abkommen.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Montrealer Protokoll durch ein klar klimaorientiertes Abkommen ersetzen; TTIP-Entwurf durch ein tatsächlich geschlossenes Handelsabkommen ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Mehrere Einträge sind eher regionale Speisen/Bezeichnungen oder allgemeine regionale Wörter als eindeutig Dialektwörter einer einzigen Gruppe. 'Semmel' ist im gesamten süddeutschen/österreichischen Raum verbreitet; 'Spätzle' und 'Eierschecke' sind Speisen, keine klaren Dialektmarker; 'Dresdner' ist ohne Ergänzung unklar.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Pro Dialekt eindeutig lexikalische Dialektformen verwenden und elliptische Einträge wie 'Dresdner' ausschreiben oder ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Die Zuordnung von Jugendsprache zu Jahrzehnten ist sehr unscharf und kaum fair lösbar: viele Wörter waren über mehrere Jahrzehnte verbreitet oder wurden erst später im Mainstream bekannt. Besonders 'Krass', 'Trash', 'Chillen', 'Digger', 'Lol', 'Nerd' und 'Fail' sind nicht eindeutig an genau eines der genannten Jahrzehnte gebunden.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Auf klar datierbare Jugendwörter/Jugendwort-des-Jahres-Belege umstellen oder die Kategorien thematisch statt chronologisch gestalten.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Mehrere Slogans sind für ein deutsches Medium-Puzzle zu unbekannt oder nicht eindeutig marken-/branchenzuordenbar. 'Samsung needs you', 'Made for real life', 'Inspire Innovate' und 'Create together' wirken nicht wie breit bekannte deutsche Werbesprüche; Spieler müssten Spezial- oder Werbehistorienwissen haben.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Durch sehr bekannte deutsche Slogans ersetzen und sicherstellen, dass jeder Slogan eindeutig einer Branche zugeordnet ist.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Stasi' und 'MfS' bezeichnen im Kern dieselbe Institution; sie werden aber in zwei verschiedenen Gruppen getrennt. Das kann Spieler verwirren, weil 'Stasi' plausibel auch als DDR-Abkürzung bzw. Abkürzungsname wahrgenommen werden kann.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: 'Stasi' durch eine nicht-abgekürzte Institution ersetzen oder 'MfS' aus der Abkürzungsgruppe entfernen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Dreibund' ist ein politisch-militärisches Bündnis, kein kulturelles Symbol des Kaiserreichs. 'Wilhelminisch' ist ein Stil-/Epochenadjektiv, aber als einzelnes Item kein konkretes Symbol wie die anderen Einträge.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Durch klar kulturelle Symbole ersetzen, etwa konkrete Kulturartefakte, Stilobjekte oder Orte.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Echokammer' ist kein Bestandteil des Bestätigungsfehlers selbst, sondern ein Umfeld/Mechanismus, der mehrere Verzerrungen verstärken kann. 'Lernkurve' ist ebenfalls kein spezifischer Dunning-Kruger-Begriff und kann allgemein zu Lernen/Kompetenzentwicklung gehören.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Für jede Verzerrung klar definitorische Marker verwenden, z. B. 'Gegenbelege ausblenden' und 'Illusorische Überlegenheit'.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Für ein Medium-Puzzle sind 'Apel', 'Präferenzutilism.' und 'Herrschaftsfr. Dialog' recht fachlich bzw. stark abgekürzt. Die Gruppe Diskursethik ist deutlich spezialistischer als die anderen drei Kategorien.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Abkürzungen ausschreiben und bei Medium eher bekanntere Kernbegriffe verwenden.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Schabbat' und 'Ramadan' sind keine Feste im gleichen Sinn wie die übrigen Einträge: Schabbat ist ein wöchentlicher Ruhetag, Ramadan ein Fastenmonat. Dadurch passen sie nicht sauber in 'Religiöse Feste'.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Schabbat durch Sukkot, Chanukka oder Purim ersetzen; Ramadan durch ein eigentliches Fest ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Die Kategorien überschneiden sich konzeptuell: Propheten sind im Alten Testament, und Apostel Jesu sind im Neuen Testament. Zudem sind mehrere Namen mehrdeutig oder überlappend, z. B. Johannes kann Apostel/Evangelist/Täufer sein und Jakobus ist ein Apostel im Neuen Testament.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Nicht nach Testament und Rollen gleichzeitig sortieren. Entweder vier Rollenkategorien oder vier klar getrennte Buch-/Traditionsgruppen verwenden.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Die Epikureer- und Neuplatoniker-Gruppen enthalten mehrere Namen, die für Medium sehr spezialisiert sind, besonders Philodem, Hermarchos, Proklos und Iamblichos.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Auf bekanntere philosophische Schulen/Vertreter wechseln oder das Puzzle als schwer einstufen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Abschaffung Zensur' ist kein klar einzelnes Aufklärungs-Ereignis wie die anderen Einträge und wirkt eher wie eine allgemeine politische Entwicklung.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Durch ein konkretes Ereignis oder Gesetz mit klarem Aufklärungsbezug ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Heine und Gogol sind literaturgeschichtlich nicht eindeutig als Romantiker einzuordnen; beide werden oft auch anderen Strömungen bzw. Übergangspositionen zugerechnet.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Durch eindeutigere Romantiker ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Der Schrei' ist eine Vorläufer-/Ikonenposition, aber nicht sauber als expressionistisches Werk im engeren Gruppensinn. 'Verkündigung' ist ohne Künstler/Titelkontext mehrdeutig und kein eindeutig bekanntes expressionistisches Werk.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Eindeutig expressionistische Werke mit klarem Titel verwenden.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Automat. Schreiben' und 'Écriture automatique' sind im Wesentlichen dasselbe Verfahren in deutscher bzw. französischer Bezeichnung und stehen in derselben Vierergruppe.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Einen der beiden Einträge durch eine andere surrealistische Technik wie 'Cadavre exquis' oder 'Frottage' ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Pop-Art-Werke und Pop-Art-Motive überlappen stark: 'Marilyn Monroe' kann als Motiv 'Filmstars' sein, 'Campbell's Soup' als Konsumartikel, und Comic-Werke wie 'Whaam!'/'Drowning Girl' als Comicmotive.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Werke als vollständige Titel formulieren und Motive so wählen, dass sie nicht direkt die genannten Werke beschreiben.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Vygotski und Dewey können konstruktivistisch gelesen werden, sind aber nicht so eindeutig und direkt wie die übrigen Zuordnungen; 'Zone nächste Entw.' ist spezifisch Vygotski und keine allgemeine Kategoriebezeichnung.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Kategorie als sozialer Konstruktivismus präzisieren oder eindeutigere konstruktivistische Begriffe verwenden.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Sender' und 'Empfänger' sind generische Kommunikationsbegriffe und nicht exklusiv dem Sender-Empfänger-Modell vorbehalten; sie können auch im Kontext anderer Kommunikationsmodelle auftauchen.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Beim Sender-Empfänger-Modell spezifischere Shannon-Weaver/Kommunikationsmodell-Begriffe verwenden oder generische Items vermeiden.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Maslows Bedürfnisstufen sind sehr allgemein und überschneiden sich semantisch mit Motivation/Arbeitszufriedenheit aus Herzbergs Modell. 'Unzufriedenheit' und 'Arbeitszufriedenheit' sind zudem generische Zustände, keine nur Herzberg-spezifischen Begriffe.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Für Herzberg spezifischere Beispiele von Hygiene- und Motivationsfaktoren verwenden.

verdicts.gptExplanation: TQM, Six Sigma und Lean sind alle Qualitätsmanagement-Konzepte; 'Kaizen' und kontinuierliche Verbesserung überschneiden sich stark.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Doppelte Kernidee vermeiden; in TQM z. B. 'PDCA' oder 'Null-Fehler-Prinzip' einsetzen, wenn Lean 'Kaizen' behält.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: FIFO und LIFO können Lagerbewertungs-/Bestandsverfahren oder Logistikmethoden sein; RFID-Tracking ist eher Technologie als System. Die Gruppen 'Methoden' und 'Systeme' sind dadurch nicht ganz trennscharf.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Systeme als konkrete Softwaresysteme halten und Technologien/Methoden separat oder eindeutiger benennen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Working Capital' ist Bilanz-/Finanzgröße und kann auch als Kennzahl gelten; 'Excel-Pivot', 'Tableau' und 'Power BI' sind allgemeine Analyse-/BI-Tools, nicht spezifisch Controlling- oder Finanzsoftware.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Software durch klar finanz-/controllingspezifische Systeme ersetzen oder die Kategorie in 'Analyse-Tools' umbenennen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Archaischer Torso' ist kein Naturbild und passt schlecht zur Kategorie 'Natur in der Lyrik'. Auch 'Ich lebe mein Leben' ist kein eindeutiges Naturmotiv wie die übrigen Rilke-Einträge.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Durch Rilke-Titel mit Naturbezug ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Die Zuordnung von Tonarten und Instrumenten zu Gefühlen/Klangfarben ist kulturell und subjektiv. 'Geige (warm)', 'Oboe (klagend)' oder 'h-Moll (traurig)' sind keine eindeutigen Fakten, sondern Konventionen/Assoziationen.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Auf objektivere Musikbegriffe umstellen, etwa Tonarten, Tempi, Instrumentenfamilien und Vortragsbezeichnungen ohne Stimmungswertungen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Farbdeutungen nach Kulturkreis sind stark kontextabhängig und teils sehr speziell. Einträge wie 'Trauer (Iran)', 'Neid (Frz.)' und 'Würde (Japan)' sind für Medium schwer verlässlich zu kennen und nicht immer eindeutig.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Bekanntere und breiter belegte Farbsymbolik verwenden oder Schwierigkeit erhöhen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Einige Bedeutungen sind zu generisch und können auch zu anderen Symbolen passen: 'Stabilität' könnte auch zur Krone/Herrschaft oder zum Kreuz/Orientierung passen; 'Lebenskraft' kann mit Herz, Kreuz oder Medizin assoziiert werden.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Bedeutungen wählen, die ikonographisch klarer an genau ein Symbol gebunden sind.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Wandertag danach' ist kein etablierter Einschulungsbrauch. 'Freier Wunsch' ist ebenfalls kein gängiger deutscher Geburtstagsbrauch in der Formulierung.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Durch etablierte Bräuche wie 'Einschulungsgottesdienst', 'Klassenfoto' oder 'Ausblasen der Kerzen' ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Die Kategorien überschneiden sich: Tier-Aberglaube enthält Glücks- und Unglückszeichen, während Glücksbringer/Unglücksbringer ebenfalls nach Wirkung sortieren. 'Schwalbe = Glück' könnte in Glücksbringer, 'Krähe = Unglück' in Unglücksbringer gehören.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Entweder nach Objektart sortieren oder nach positiver/negativer Wirkung, aber nicht beides mischen.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: Methoden und Mittel überschneiden sich fachlich: Homöopathie ist eine Methode, Globuli sind das typische Mittel derselben Praxis; Schüßler-Salze können als Methode/System und Mittel gelesen werden.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Mittel als konkrete Substanzen halten und Methoden ohne direkt zugehörige Mittel-Dopplung wählen.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Mehrere Items sind Lehrer/Traditionsmarker statt Techniken oder Merkmale. 'Dojo' ist ein Übungsort, kein Zen-Merkmal im gleichen Sinn wie Zazen/Koan/Satori; 'Kabat-Zinn', 'Goenka' und 'Maharishi' sind Personen.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Gruppen als 'Begriffe/Personen' benennen oder Personen durch Praxismerkmale ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Schmale Biene' ist kein gängiger deutscher Name einer typischen Nischen-Art. Die Kategorie 'Typische Nischen-Arten' wirkt zudem uneinheitlich: Kletterspecht und Bartgeier sind Arten/Artgruppen, Blattschneider-Ameise ist eher eine ökologische Gilde/Trivialgruppe.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Durch etablierte, klar benannte Arten oder Gilden ersetzen und den Gruppentitel präzisieren.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Leuchtturm' als Gefahr ist zu singulär und veraltet/eng formuliert; gemeint sind eher Lichtverschmutzung oder beleuchtete Bauwerke. 'Westatlant. Zug' ist im deutschen Kontext als Vogelzugroute weniger geläufig als die großen Flyways und wirkt neben Ostatlantik/Zentralasien/Mittelmeer unsauber.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Leuchtturm durch 'Lichtverschmutzung' ersetzen und Routen nach anerkannten Flyways konsistent benennen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Honigbiene, Wildbiene und Hummel sind semantisch stark überlappend: Hummeln sind Wildbienen im weiteren Sinn, und Honigbienen sind ebenfalls Bienen.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Statt enger Bienen-Untergruppen breiter verschiedene Insektengruppen wählen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Luftschadstoffe' sind eher Ursache/Belastungsfaktor der Stadtökologie als ein spezifischer Hitzeinsel-Begriff. 'Steinbrech' ist als Stadtbiodiversitäts-Beispiel weniger typisch und kann eher als Pflanzenname allgemein wirken.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Für Hitzeinseln klar thermische Mechanismen verwenden; für Stadtbiodiversität etablierte urbane Arten wählen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Die Slow-Food-Gerichte sind überwiegend süddeutsch/schwäbisch und nicht eindeutig 'Slow Food' im engeren Sinn. Sie wirken wie traditionelle Regionalgerichte, während die Slow-Food-Konzepte institutionelle Slow-Food-Begriffe sind.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Kategorie in 'Regionale Traditionsgerichte' umbenennen oder konkrete Slow-Food-Presidia/Arche-Produkte verwenden.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Gelification' ist im Deutschen unüblich und bedeutet praktisch Gelierung; gleichzeitig steht 'Gel' in der Begriffsgruppe. Technik und Begriff überschneiden sich dadurch semantisch.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: 'Gelification' durch die deutsche Form 'Gelierung' ersetzen und 'Gel' in der Begriffsgruppe durch einen nicht direkt abgeleiteten Begriff ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Smart Grid' kann sowohl Smart-City-Infrastruktur als auch Industrie-/Energie-Digitalisierung sein; 'Bürgerdienste App' überschneidet sich mit E-Government. Die Gruppen Smart City und E-Government sind thematisch nicht vollständig getrennt.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Smart City auf urbane Infrastruktur begrenzen und digitale Verwaltungsdienste ausschließlich in E-Government belassen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Penetrationstest' ist eher eine Schutz-/Prüfmaßnahme und kann in die Schutzmaßnahmen-Gruppe passen, nicht nur in allgemeine Sicherheitsbegriffe.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Penetrationstest entweder zu Schutzmaßnahmen verschieben oder durch einen neutraleren Begriff wie 'Angriffsvektor' ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Ethereum, Solana und Cardano sind Kryptowährungen, aber zugleich Smart-Contract-/Blockchain-Technologieplattformen; 'Proof of Work' und 'Proof of Stake' sind Konsensmechanismen und damit direkt Teil der Blockchain-Konzepte.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Kryptowährungen als Coins/Tokens und Technologien als klar andere technische Komponenten trennen; Konsensmechanismen nur in einer Kategorie verwenden.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Metaverse' ist eher Anwendung/Plattformidee als AR/VR-Technik und überschneidet sich mit breiteren Zukunftstechnologie-Konzepten.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Metaverse durch einen technischen XR-Begriff wie 'Head-Mounted Display' oder 'Handtracking' ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Gen-Antrieb' ist sowohl Methode/Technologie als auch Anwendung der Geneditierung. 'Maus Modelltier' ist kein editierter Organismus im gleichen Sinn wie die anderen Beispiele, sondern eine allgemeine Forschungskategorie.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Gen-Antrieb entweder als Technologie behandeln oder durch eine klare Anwendung ersetzen; Organismen als konkrete editierte Beispiele formulieren.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Eigentumsrecht Gen' ist eher ethisch/rechtliche Kontroverse als Gefahr. 'Plastik-Bakterium' ist umgangssprachlich und kann biologischen Abbau oder Produktion meinen.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Gefahren auf Risikoarten begrenzen und Organismen konkreter benennen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Starship' ist noch kein etabliertes Weltraumtourismus-Fahrzeug wie New Shepard/VSS Unity; Axiom Space ist eher kommerzielle Raumstation/ISS-Missionsfirma als klassischer Tourismus-Anbieter.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Fahrzeuge auf tatsächlich touristisch genutzte Systeme begrenzen oder Kategorie breiter als kommerzielle Raumfahrt fassen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Fehlende Schwerkraft' ist für den Mars falsch formuliert: Mars hat geringere Schwerkraft, nicht fehlende. Gerard O'Neill ist vor allem für Weltraumkolonien/O'Neill-Zylinder bekannt, nicht spezifisch für Mars-Kolonisierung.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: 'Geringe Schwerkraft' verwenden und O'Neill durch eine klar marsbezogene Person ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'WOW-Signal' und 'Arecibo-Botschaft' sind keine SETI-Projekte, sondern ein Signalereignis bzw. eine gesendete Botschaft. Außerdem überschneiden sich SETI-Suche und SETI-Projekte stark, weil 'Allen Telescope Array' auch ein konkretes SETI-Instrument/Projektbezug ist.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: SETI-Projekte durch echte Projekte/Programme ersetzen und Ereignisse/Botschaften in eine eigene Kategorie verschieben oder entfernen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Bürgerhaushalt digit.' und 'Partizipationsplattf.' überschneiden sich stark mit Online-Beteiligung und könnten sowohl Demokratie-Konzepte als auch Digitale Demokratie sein. 'Querdenker' und 'Pegida' als Demokratie-Bewegungen sind normativ und thematisch eher antidemokratische/protestpolitische Bewegungen, was die Kategorie irritierend macht.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Digitale Beteiligungsformen nur in einer Kategorie führen und die Bewegungen-Kategorie neutraler benennen oder ersetzen.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Flucht' als Migrationstyp überschneidet sich direkt mit Migrationsgründen wie Krieg/Gewalt und politischer Verfolgung sowie mit Rechten wie Asylrecht/Flüchtlingskonvention.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Typen enger definieren oder Flucht durch einen Migrationstyp ersetzen, der nicht dieselben Rechts-/Grundkategorien aktiviert.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Hofstede-Dimensionen sind selbst interkulturelle Konzepte; dadurch überschneiden sich 'Interkult. Konzepte' und 'Hofstede-Dimensionen' konzeptuell. 'Pünktlichkeit' und 'Direktheit' sind außerdem auch klassische Kulturdimensionen/Trainingsinhalte, nicht nur Missverständnisse.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Die allgemeine Kategorie nicht mit 'Kulturdimensionen' füllen, wenn eine eigene Hofstede-Dimensionen-Gruppe existiert.

verdicts.gptExplanation: 'Digit. Nomadentum' überschneidet sich mit Gig Economy/Freelancing und Remote Work; 'Co-Working-Space' ist Infrastruktur für mehrere Arbeitsformen, nicht spezifisch Homeoffice. 'Robotersteuer' gehört eher zur Automatisierungs-/Politikdebatte als zum Grundeinkommen selbst.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Homeoffice auf Arbeitsortmodelle begrenzen und Grundeinkommen auf Einkommensmodelle/Pilotprojekte statt Finanzierungsinstrumente fokussieren.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Superintelligenz, AGI, Singularität und KI-Ethik überschneiden sich stark. 'Kontrollproblem', 'Alignment', 'AI Safety' und 'Werteproblem' beschreiben eng verwandte Sicherheits-/Ausrichtungsfragen und könnten in mehreren Kategorien stehen; 'Bostrom' passt auch zu Superintelligenz und AI Safety.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Kategorien stärker trennen, z. B. Personen, technische Begriffe, Zukunftsszenarien und Ethikprinzipien ohne überlappende Safety-Begriffe.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: „1918 erste Wahl“ ist für das deutsche Frauenwahlrecht sachlich falsch formuliert. Das Wahlrecht wurde im November 1918 eingeführt, aber die erste reichsweite Wahl, an der Frauen teilnehmen konnten, war die Wahl zur Nationalversammlung am 19. Januar 1919.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Zum Beispiel „1918 Wahlrecht erkämpft“ oder „1919 erste Wahl“ verwenden.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Die Kategorien sind abstrakte Stimmungsmetaphern, und mehrere Naturbilder lassen sich plausibel mehreren Gruppen zuordnen. „Fluss versickert“, „Quelle trocken“ und „Same ohne Regen“ können alle Erschöpfung, Stagnation oder Dürre/Bedrohung signalisieren; „Baum nach Sturm nackt“ kann ebenso Nachwirkung einer Bedrohung wie Erschöpfung sein.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Die Gruppen stärker durch klarere, weniger austauschbare Naturzeichen trennen oder konkretere Labels wählen, etwa Dürre, Neubeginn, Unwettergefahr, Stillstand.

verdicts.gptExplanation: „Kölner Dom, 8 Jhd.“ ist missverständlich bis falsch: Der heutige gotische Kölner Dom wurde ab 1248 gebaut; „8. Jahrhundert“ passt nicht zur gotischen Bauphase. Gemeint ist vermutlich eine acht Jahrhunderte lange Bau-/Vollendungsgeschichte.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Zum Beispiel „Kölner Dom ab 1248“ oder „Kölner Dom jahrhundertelang“ verwenden.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Die Berliner Kongresshalle ist nicht das typische oder eindeutige Beispiel für Brutalismus; sie wird meist der Nachkriegsmoderne zugeordnet und hat nicht die klaren Brutalismus-Merkmale der übrigen Items.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Durch ein eindeutigeres brutalistisches Beispiel ersetzen, etwa „Mächtige Betonburg“, „Universitätsbau aus Rohbeton“ oder ein klar brutalistisches deutsches Gebäude.

verdicts.gptExplanation: „Pegel steigt im Tal“ kann in dieser Puzzleoberfläche leicht zur Gruppe „Überschwemmung“ gelegt werden, weil steigende Pegel dort ein zentrales Signal sind. In der Gletscherschwund-Gruppe ist es nur indirekt über Schmelzwasser plausibel.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Für Gletscherschwund ein eindeutigeres Bild wählen, etwa „Gletscherzunge zieht sich zurück“ oder „Moräne liegt frei“.

verdicts.gptExplanation: „Einatmen stoppt Regen“ kann sowohl als kindliche Allmachtsvorstellung als auch als magisches Denken gelesen werden. Die Kategorien „Magie“ und „Allmacht“ liegen hier konzeptuell nah beieinander.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Die Allmacht-Items stärker auf körperliche oder soziale Überlegenheit statt übernatürliche Kausalität ausrichten.

verdicts.gptExplanation: „Eigentor zugeben“ passt semantisch sehr stark zu Fairness, weil es um Ehrlichkeit und das Zugeben eines eigenen Fehlers geht. In „Teamgeist“ ist es deutlich weniger eindeutig als die anderen Items.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Für Teamgeist ein klar kooperatives Item verwenden, etwa „Pass statt Alleingang“, „Mitspieler trösten“ oder „Gemeinsam verteidigen“.

verdicts.gptExplanation: „Kette schmieden“ enthält „schmieden“ und kann dadurch stark zur Gruppe „Schmied“ gezogen werden. Fachlich ist „Kette“ beim Weben zwar die Kettfäden, aber die Formulierung ist für ein Medium-Puzzle unnötig irreführend.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Eindeutiger formulieren, etwa „Kettfäden spannen“.

verdicts.gptExplanation: „Baum ausschießen“ ist kein naheliegender oder korrekt wirkender Ausdruck beim Segelsetzen. Üblicher wären etwa „Baum ausschwenken“, „Schot fieren“ oder „Segel setzen“.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Durch einen gängigen Segelbegriff ersetzen, etwa „Großsegel setzen“, „Schot fieren“ oder „Fock hochziehen“.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Mehrere Items in „Lügen“ sind populäre, aber wissenschaftlich unzuverlässige Körpersprache-Mythen. Besonders „Blick nach oben links“ ist keine belastbare Lügenanzeige und kann Spieler fairerweise nicht eindeutig zur Kategorie führen.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Die Kategorie als „Unsicherheit“ oder „Nervosität“ umarbeiten, oder eindeutigere Kontextsignale fürs Lügen verwenden, z. B. „Widerspruch in der Geschichte“.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Ladle is a kitchen utensil, but it is not normally considered cutlery in the same everyday sense as fork, knife, and spoon. For an easy puzzle this makes the category feel imprecise.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename the group to "Kitchen Utensils" or replace Ladle with another clear cutlery item such as Teaspoon.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Drill is usually a power tool, not a hand tool. The other items are straightforward hand tools, so this one weakens the category.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace Drill with Pliers, Screwdriver, or Chisel; or rename the group to "Tools".

verdicts.gptExplanation: Footwear is a type of clothing/wear, so the labels "Clothing" and "Footwear" are semantically nested even though the listed items separate cleanly.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Rename "Clothing" to a narrower label such as "Upper-Body Clothing" or replace one category with a non-overlapping everyday category.

labelOverlap.note: no lexical overlap — semantic-only claim; needs-claude-review

verdicts.gptExplanation: "Board Games" and "Party Games" overlap as category concepts. Pictionary, Jenga, and Twister are commonly sold or described as board/tabletop games as well as party games, so the distinction is not clean for easy tier.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use a more precise label such as "Classic Board Games" and choose party games that are not also commonly board/tabletop games, or replace one group.

labelOverlap.note: labels share tokens but neither is subset — could be parallel-sibling (usually OK)

verdicts.gptExplanation: Spell is magical, but it is not an item in the same concrete sense as Wand, Potion, and Amulet. The label "Magical Items" is therefore imprecise.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace Spell with a concrete object such as Scroll, Ring, Crystal, or Talisman.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Stracciatella and Neapolitan are less everyday than the rest of the batch, especially for an English easy puzzle. They are valid ice cream flavors, but the group is noticeably more specialized than expected.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use more common flavors such as Chocolate, Strawberry, Mint, or Cookies and Cream.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Building Materials overlaps with the more specific material categories implied by Cement, Concrete, Plaster, and Mortar. Concrete contains cement, and mortar often contains cement, making the item set internally related in a way that can feel like ingredients versus materials rather than four sibling examples.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: For easy tier, use more distinct building materials such as Brick, Wood, Steel, and Concrete, or rename the category to "Masonry Materials" and avoid ingredient/product nesting.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Iced Tea is tea and can be considered a hot drink served cold, while Chai and Matcha are also tea drinks. The hot/cold split relies on serving temperature rather than the drink identity, which can make Iced Tea feel connected to the Hot Drinks group.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace Iced Tea with Soda, Cola, Juice, or another cold drink without a hot-drink counterpart.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Compass is ambiguous: it can be a drawing/measuring tool, but in an easy puzzle many players will think of a navigation compass rather than a measuring tool.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace Compass with Tape Measure, Protractor, or Square.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Crescent and gibbous describe moon shape, while waxing and waning describe whether illumination is increasing or decreasing. They combine with each other rather than forming four parallel moon phases, so the category is not a clean set.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use four full phase names such as New Moon, First Quarter, Full Moon, and Last Quarter, or use Waxing Crescent, Waxing Gibbous, Waning Crescent, and Waning Gibbous.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Meteor and comet are sky objects/events, and a meteor shower or comet appearance can be a sky event, but the label mixes event types with objects. This is less concrete than expected for easy tier.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Use clearer event names such as Meteor Shower, Solar Eclipse, Lunar Eclipse, and Aurora.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Contrail is not one of the standard high cloud genera alongside cirrus, cirrocumulus, and cirrostratus. Fog and mist are also not low cloud genera in the same way as stratus and stratocumulus.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace Contrail with a standard high-cloud term if available, and rename "Low Clouds" to include ground-level phenomena or use standard low-cloud types only.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The cloud categories are nested/overlapping: fog is essentially cloud at ground level, mist is closely related to fog, and "Overcast" in Sky Colors describes cloud cover rather than a color. The puzzle mixes cloud types, weather signs, and sky conditions in a way that is not clean for easy tier.
verdicts.gptSuggestedFix: Replace this puzzle or simplify it into concrete everyday groups such as Cloud Types, Storm Features, Weather Words, and Sky Colors with non-overlapping items.

verdicts.gptExplanation: This is not easy-tier content. Gothic and Baroque architectural features, plus terms like bailey, stucco, rotunda, and glass curtain, require specialized architectural knowledge.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Uranus and Neptune are ice giants, not gas giants under the common modern classification. The group label is factually shaky for an astronomy puzzle.

verdicts.gptExplanation: This is more specialized than easy-tier English everyday knowledge. Programming paradigms and shell commands like Awk and Sed are developer-specific.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Mezzo is not a complete dynamic marking by itself in the same way Piano and Forte are; it normally modifies piano or forte. Crescendo is also a dynamic change rather than a dynamic level. The category mixes related but non-parallel music terms.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The puzzle is music-theory specific, with Italian tempo and articulation vocabulary. That is likely above general easy-tier expectation.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Shepherd and Sheepdog are generic dog-type terms rather than clear breeds, and they overlap strongly with the herding category. Some Corgis are herding dogs but also widely treated as a small companion breed, making the group less clean.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Sphynx is not a short-haired cat; it is commonly known as a hairless breed. It does not belong cleanly under "Short-haired Cats".

verdicts.gptExplanation: Pan and Dolly are camera movements, not camera shots in the same sense as Closeup and Wide. The group mixes shot sizes with movements.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Theater overlaps with the other literary/form categories: tragedy and farce can be genres or forms, monologue is a script/performance element, and opera is a performing art rather than strictly theater in the same way. The label is broad and uneven.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The history categories are broad and require more specialized knowledge than easy tier, especially Assyria, Carthage, Medici, and distinctions among modern events.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Robin is both a spring animal and a bird/songbird-type item; within this puzzle it is fine only if no bird category exists, but it remains a seasonal association rather than a firm category member.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several items repeat the category keyword “Spring,” making the group partly keyword-match rather than puzzle inference.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Monorail is both a type of train and a rail transport system/track concept, and “Signal” can be both a trackside item and a station/railway operating term.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Drone is not specifically rotorcraft; drones can be fixed-wing as well as multirotor. In this puzzle it can blur Rotorcraft with Winged Aircraft.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Several seasonal 'things' are not exclusive to one season. Umbrella is strongly associated with autumn/rain as well as spring, and kite can be spring or summer; the broad labels make the categories fuzzy for an easy puzzle.

verdicts.gptExplanation: The label 'The Five Senses' lists only four senses and omits Touch. A four-item group can be 'Senses', but 'The Five Senses' is inaccurate as presented.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Case is too generic: it could be a musician's instrument case, but it is also a common container outside music and lacks a music-specific cue compared with the other gear items.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Liner and Trash Bag are near-interchangeable in this context, and Liner could be read as a bin/trash bag. This weakens uniqueness inside the Trash & Recycling group.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Agenda and Minutes are document types as well as meeting-room items, so they can reasonably belong to both Meeting Room and Document Types.

verdicts.gptExplanation: This is likely too specialized for easy: Docent, Conservator, Registrar, Plinth, and Vitrine are museum/gallery vocabulary that many easy-level players may not know.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Trapdoor is both stage dressing/equipment and a classic magic prop used in stage illusions, so it can overlap with Stage Magic Props.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Bonsai is strongly associated with Japan but is not uniquely Japanese; Spring Roll and Fried Rice are common across multiple East/Southeast Asian cuisines and are not exclusively Chinese. The symbol/food nationality categories rely on cultural associations that blur easily.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Castle and Forest are generic settings, not specifically Arthurian legendary places. They do not uniquely point to Arthurian legend.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Skeleton can be decor but also a very common Halloween costume, overlapping Halloween Decor and Halloween Costumes.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Alarm Clock, Slippers, and Robe are bedroom items as much as morning-routine items, so they do not form a clean exclusive activity category.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Nail Polish is a product, not a nail service. The category mixes services with an item.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Bungee Jumping is not an air sport in the same sense as skydiving, paragliding, and hang gliding; Cliff Diving is a jump/fall activity as well as water-related. These categories can feel organized by setting rather than sport type.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Beowulf is an Old English legendary hero, and Leif Erikson is a historical Norse explorer, not a Viking hero in the same mythic category as Sigurd/Ragnar. Bifrost is also a place/bridge rather than an item, so the group label is inaccurate.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Cleopatra and Nefertiti are shaky for 'Famous Pharaohs' at easy level: Cleopatra was a Ptolemaic queen/pharaoh, while Nefertiti is primarily known as a queen and her status as pharaoh is disputed.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Arraignment and Sentencing are court proceedings, while Opening Statement and Verdict are trial components. The label Trial Phases is imprecise because arraignment usually occurs before trial and sentencing after conviction.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Natural is not a key signature mark in the same way as sharp and flat; Double Sharp is not normally used in standard key signatures. The group is closer to accidentals than key signature marks.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Gingerbread can be a cake or cookie, so it can overlap with Layer Cakes. Sponge and Pound are also broad cake types, not specifically layer cakes.

verdicts.gptExplanation: Iris can be bulb/rhizome-like and Bluebell is commonly a bulb flower, blurring Bulb Flowers with Garden Perennials/Wildflowers.
